headline: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for First-Quarter Results
summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 5:30 p.m. ET (2:30 p.m. PT). The company will discuss first-quarter results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
